summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected. Closed candidates are kept closed, security-sensitive refs are quarantined, and open non-security PRs are classified conservatively as related/independent/needs-human based on hydrated artifact evidence and current checks.

actions.reason: Already closed; no mutation is valid in plan mode.

This needs maintainer/product judgment on UI authorization behavior and the requested follow-up test.
Technical correctness of the cron optional-search-miss heuristic remains unresolved.
Clear low-signal docs correction in the wrong direction, but policy notes low-signal closeout is disabled for this job.
Maintainer-owned draft candidate should stay open for normal review, not inventory closure.

Related candidate for preserveKeys work, but failing checks and broad unrelated churn block merge or fixed-by-candidate closeout.
